title: Racing Monster Truck in Stadium Coloring Page

funFacts: The body of a monster truck is made of lightweight fiberglass, designed to break away during spectacular stadium rolls.
monster trucks are custom-built vehicles featuring massive 66-inch tires and high-output engines producing up to 1,500 horsepower.
